nasb.text: Following after Paul and us, she kept crying out, saying, “These men are bond-servants of the Most High God, who are proclaiming to you the way of salvation.”

esv.text: She followed Paul and us, crying out, “These men are servants of the Most High God, who proclaim to you the way of salvation.”

cnv.text: 她跟著保羅和我們，喊叫說：“這些人是至高　神的僕人，向你們傳講得救的道路。”

ccb.text: 她跟着保罗和我们大喊大叫：“这些人是至高上帝的奴仆，是来向你们宣讲得救之道的。”

csbs.text: 她跟着保罗和我们，喊叫说：“这些人是至高神的奴仆，向你们传讲救恩的道。”
